No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (4.3) and develops technical/creative skills for communication and commercial fields, fostering valuable content creation (4.4).
evidence: 將攝影應用在傳播或商業領域
apply photography in communication or commercial fields

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students with creative and practical skills for employment in 'communication or commercial fields,' supporting decent job creation and economic productivity (Targets 8.2, 8.3).
evidence: 傳播或商業領域所需要的影像
images required in the communication or commercial fields

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course focuses on technological innovation in digital imaging, noting its 'revolutionary changes' and connection to 'information technology, communication technology,' aligning with Target 9.5.
evidence: 產製影像的技術也產生巨大轉變
與資訊科技、通訊科技習習相關
the technology for producing images has undergone a huge transformation

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course encourages documenting urban life ('Street and life's beauty') and local culture through reference books, relating to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 王船祭典 : 臺灣民俗
童乩 : 台湾のシャーマニズム

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course covers 'documentary and news' photography, a key practice for ensuring public access to information and protecting fundamental freedoms, as per Target 16.10.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to global partnerships.
